title: BCC single-mode-cone uniqueness + positive local curvature anchor (metastable branch)
statement: Within the single-mode ansatz class intersected with the Math56 constraint cone, the BCC critical point is unique, and the curvature anchor m*^2=+4.247e-2 at mu^2=+5e-3 reproduces to 4 digits on the subset-4-cosine (metastable) branch. This is a positive LOCAL CURVATURE statement on the cone -- NOT a mass gap (m*^2 is not identified with the symmetry-projected cone gap Delta_cone).
scope: CLOSED@SINGLE-MODE-CONE (local curvature anchor). Metastable branch (Delta F>0). Regime-III undetermined (legacy G2 audit). Explicitly NOT a continuum/thermodynamic mass gap; see B4-MASS-GAP (OPEN) for the mass-gap target and the b4-massgap-gap-scope addendum for Delta_cone.
falsifier: A second distinct minimiser within the single-mode + cone class at the operating point, or failure to reproduce the anchor m*^2 within stated tolerance. (This is a UNIQUENESS/anchor falsifier, NOT a gap falsifier.)
no_overclaim: A mass gap (continuum/thermodynamic); identification m*^2 = Delta_cone; ground-state status beyond the single-mode cone; favourability (the anchor is metastable, Delta F>0).
